name: STRATUS PROPERTIES INC
business: Stratus Properties Inc. is a residential and retail focused real estate company with headquarters in Austin, Texas. It is engaged primarily in the entitlement, development, management, leasing and sale of multi-family and single-family residential and commercial real estate properties in the Austin, Texas area and other select markets in Texas. The company generates revenues and cash flows from the sale of developed and undeveloped properties, leasing of retail, mixed-use and multi-family properties, and development and asset management fees.
sellsTo: retail tenants (grocery stores, restaurants, healthcare services, fitness centers, movie theater, other retail products and services)

exposures.sentence: We are engaged primarily in the entitlement, development, management, leasing and sale of multi-family and single-family residential and commercial real estate properties in the Austin, Texas area and other select markets in Texas.

We are engaged primarily in the entitlement, development, management, leasing and sale of multi-family and single-family residential and commercial real estate properties in the Austin, Texas area and other select markets in Texas.

catalysts.event: Sale of Kingwood Place for $60.8 million completed
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we sold Kingwood Place for $60.8 million.

catalysts.event: Board approved plan of complete liquidation and dissolution, subject to stockholder approval
catalysts.sentence: On March 24, 2026, after concluding that review and following consultation with external financial, tax and legal advisors, our Board approved, subject to stockholder approval, a plan of complete liquidation and dissolution of us (Plan of Liquidation) and announced an estimated range of potential liquidating distributions.

catalysts.event: Expected start of executing contracts for sales of home sites in Holden Hills Phase 1
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin executing contracts for sales of the home sites in late March 2026.

catalysts.event: Barton Creek MUD bond sale expected in second-quarter 2026 for reimbursements
catalysts.sentence: One of the Barton Creek MUDs has received state approval to sell bonds in second-quarter 2026 that, if successfully sold, is expected to result in reimbursements to the Holden Hills Phase 1 partnership of $8.8 million, which will be used to pay down the Holden Hills Phase 1 construction loan, and $6.8 million to us.

catalysts.event: Contract entered to sell New Caney land for approximately $12.7 million
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we entered into a contract to sell the New Caney land for approximately $12.7 million, which is subject to satisfaction of closing conditions.

catalysts.event: Offer received for retail component of Jones Crossing of $46.5 million; negotiations ongoing
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we received an offer for the retail component, including undeveloped commercial acreage, of Jones Crossing of $46.5 million and are negotiating a sales contract.
